panels.description: Wide shot: The cottage of the lovers in a serene forest clearing at dusk. Soft, warm lighting emanates from the windows, silhouettes of figures moving inside. Atmospheric and peaceful.

bubbles.text: Safie found good hands... she arrived in safety at the cottage of her lover.

panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator (The Creature), a large, shadowed, hulking figure crouched in a dimly lit wood. He discovers a worn leather portmanteau on the mossy ground. His oversized hand reaches out, fingers trembling slightly.

bubbles.text: A leathern portmanteau... abandoned in the wood. A prize.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The Creature sitting in his dark, cramped hovel, reading by a sliver of moonlight. Books are spread around him. His face, scarred and weary, shows intense concentration and wonder.

bubbles.text: Paradise Lost... Plutarch... Sorrows of Werter. My new world.

panels.description: Close-up: The Creature's eyes, wide and reflecting the pages of the book. His expression transitions from delight to deep, melancholic sorrow. The lighting is harsh and dramatic, emphasizing his grotesque features.

bubbles.text: They raised me to ecstasy, but sank me into the lowest dejection. Werter... he is more divine than I.

panels.description: Extreme close-up: The Creature stares at his own reflection in a puddle of water inside his hovel. His hand touches his scarred, heavy jaw. The background is pitch black. Intense contrast between his monstrous appearance and his inquisitive eyes.

bubbles.text: My person is hideous. My stature is gigantic. What am I?
